channel.title: ALL LIST - MORAGS DAILY PODCASTS
channel.description: Morag's daily podcast feed - AI Daily Brief, Nate B Jones, and MoPods originals
channel.itunes:author: Morag

item.title: [MoPod] SOM Schema v0.2 - Medium Deep Dive
item.description: SOM Open Specification v0.2 walked through in sixteen minutes. The four architectural properties, federated identity, vendor tiers, Skills architecture, TAMS junction, and three things the founders haven't thought of yet.

item.title: [MoPod] [TEST] THIS IS FOR THE MOPOD LIST
item.description: Test episode to verify the MOPOD feed is working correctly.

item.title: [NBJ] Google's New Quantization is a Game Changer
item.description: What's really happening inside AI memory, and why it's the bottleneck threatening every LLM deployment at scale?

item.title: [NBJ] There Are Only 5 Safe Places to Build in AI Right Now. Are You in One?
item.description: What's really happening inside the app builder landscape when Lovable raises $6.6 billion and ships 100,000 new projects every day but most of these companies are functionally thin wrappers?

item.title: [AIDB] Why Enterprise AI Has a Leadership Problem
item.description: New studies from A16Z, KPMG, Writer, and WalkMe paint a picture of enterprise AI that's simultaneously accelerating and breaking down.

item.title: [NBJ] Nasdaq Quietly Changed Its Rules. Now Your 401(k) Pays for SpaceX's IPO.
item.description: Nasdaq just rewrote its listing requirements for the first time in decades, slashing the shareholder threshold from 400 to 200.

item.title: [AIDB] All of AI's New Models and Tools
item.description: While much of the week's discourse centered on models we can't use yet, the rest of the AI industry shipped a ton.
